testimonials.quote: Finally, a lager that doesn't taste like water. This is my go-to after a run.
testimonials.author: Sarah K.

testimonials.quote: Big IPA flavor without the bitterness. This is the IPA that converted me.
testimonials.author: James L.

testimonials.quote: Smooth, balanced, perfect for any occasion. I keep a 12-pack in my fridge.
testimonials.author: Emily R.

testimonials.quote: Rich and malty without being heavy. This is my fall go-to.
testimonials.author: Marcus T.
